"Star and Key of the Indian Ocean"
Anthem: "Motherland"
Islands of the Republic of Mauritius
  • Islands of Mauritius labelled in black.
    * Tromelin Island (part of the French Southern and Antarctic Lands, claimed by Mauritius).
    * The Chagos Archipelago (the British Indian Ocean Territory) are set to be transferred to Mauritius in 2026.[2]
